name: Ruby Lsp
description: Ruby language server for Claude Code, providing code intelligence and analysis.
longDescription: Integrates Shopify's Ruby LSP into Claude Code for code intelligence across Ruby projects. Supports `.rb`, `.rake`, `.gemspec`, `.ru`, and `.erb` files. Provides language server features like go-to-definition, hover information, completion, diagnostics, and document symbols. Requires Ruby 3.0 or later. Install via `gem install ruby-lsp` or add to your Gemfile under the development group.
